name: LinkedIn People & Company Enrichment API
description: Extract B2B contact data from LinkedIn public profiles via mobile proxy: job titles, companies, skills, education, and employee search. Alternative to ZoomInfo ($15K+/year) at $0.03/profile.
longDescription: Full LinkedIn intelligence pipeline via T-Mobile US mobile carrier proxies. Extract person profiles (name, headline, company, experience, education, skills), company data (description, industry, headcount, job openings), search people by title/location/industry, and find employees by company + role. B2B data enrichment at x402 micropayment prices — no subscription required.
whyMobileProxy: LinkedIn has the most aggressive anti-scraping measures of any major platform. It blocks datacenter IPs and flags known residential proxy ranges (Bright Data, ProxyEmpire IPs are specifically detected). Only real 4G/5G carrier IPs from actual cell towers blend with legitimate LinkedIn mobile app traffic. T-Mobile US mobile IPs via Proxies.sx are the only reliable method for programmatic LinkedIn data extraction at scale.

vs.name: ZoomInfo
vs.limitation: Annual subscription, limited API calls, CRM integration focus

vs.name: Proxycurl
vs.limitation: Monthly minimum, account required, slow refresh cycle

vs.name: LinkedIn Sales Navigator
vs.limitation: UI-only, no API, seats required, 2.5K search limit

vs.name: Apollo.io
vs.limitation: Email focus, outdated data, no real-time scraping

competitive.ourAdvantage: Real-time LinkedIn data at $0.03/profile via x402 micropayments. No subscription, no monthly minimum, no seats. Fresh data on every request via T-Mobile US mobile proxies.

/api/linkedin/person.description: Extract person profile: name, headline, location, current company, experience, education, skills

/api/linkedin/company.description: Extract company profile: name, description, industry, headquarters, employee count, job openings

/api/linkedin/search/people.description: Search LinkedIn people by title, location, and industry. Returns up to 10 profiles.

params.title: Job title to search (required), e.g. CTO
params.location: City or region (optional), e.g. San Francisco

/api/linkedin/company/:id/employees.description: Find employees of a company by job title. Returns up to 10 profiles.

params.id: Company name or LinkedIn ID in URL path (required), e.g. /api/linkedin/company/stripe/employees
params.title: Job title filter (optional), e.g. engineer

limitations: Private profiles return limited public data only
LinkedIn may serve authentication walls for some profiles — mobile carrier IP reduces (but doesn't eliminate) this risk
Search uses Google's site: operator for LinkedIn — results depend on Google's index freshness
Rate limited to 20 proxy requests/minute per client IP
Employee search is approximate — results from Google's LinkedIn index, not direct LinkedIn API
